title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・輝き、揺らめいて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her frustration at losing the spring Tenno
Sho, Mejiro Bright vows to keep trying. Her
persistence reminds Mejiro Dober of the racers
she looks up to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober feels a pull to become like Mejiro
Bright, but then she realizes she's always been
focused on becoming someone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because she has no confidence in herself, she's
been chasing after others. But everyone she sees
as shining was able to succeed because they were
resolved to do things their own way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having come to this conclusion, Mejiro Dober
decides she must confront her own weaknesses if
she wants to forge a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal is no longer to become like anyone else
but to become truly strong as Mejiro Dober! Her
mind made up, she begins preparing for the
Takarazuka Kinen.
